description: An endorsement of another user's skill. Lives in the endorser's PDS; the endorser is implicit (whoever owns the repository).

main.description: Record representing an endorsement of another user's claimed skill.

subject.description: DID of the user whose skill is being endorsed.

skill.description: StrongRef to the id.sifa.profile.skill record being endorsed. The AT-URI identifies the skill, and the CID pins the version.

comment.description: Optional brief comment explaining the endorsement.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this endorsement was created.
